use_cases: User registration for SaaS platforms with creative or tech focus
Team onboarding with split-screen branding experience
Account creation flow for design or development tools
ai_summary: A split-screen signup form featuring a dark gradient hero section with bold headline on the left and a clean light form with rocket icon on the right. Designed for SaaS and creative tool platforms, it includes email and password inputs with account creation and login actions. The minimalist design with gradient accents creates a modern developer-focused aesthetic.
